history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person stands in front of a large, modern building with arched windows. They are wearing a blue t-shirt with graphics and text, a white long-sleeved shirt underneath, baggy denim jeans, and a blue baseball cap. The person is looking down and adjusting their cap. To their left is a green signpost with "MOI" and "ASSEMBLY POINT" written on it in English and Malay, along with pictograms of people and arrows. The sign also has "P2K3" and a cross symbol. The background shows the building's facade, a palm tree, and some orange traffic cones on the street. To the right of the person, there's a green trash bin on wheels, a yellow caution sign, and some black trash bags. The ground is wet, suggesting it might have rained recently. The lighting is bright, casting some shadows. The overall mood is casual and urban.

```json
{
  "prompt": "A young person wearing a blue graphic t-shirt, white long-sleeved shirt, baggy washed-out denim jeans, and a blue baseball cap stands in front of a modern building with large arched windows. The person is looking down and adjusting their cap, with hands near their head. To the left, a prominent green signpost reads 'MOI' and 'ASSEMBLY POINT' in English and Malay, featuring pictograms of people and directional arrows, along with 'P2K3' and a cross symbol. The background includes the building's grey facade, a tall palm tree, and orange traffic cones on a wet street. To the right, a green wheeled trash bin, a yellow 'caution' sign, and black trash bags are visible. The ground appears wet and reflective. The scene is lit by bright daylight, creating subtle shadows. The style is urban, casual, and contemporary. The color palette is dominated by the green of the sign, the blue of the person's attire, and the grey of the building. --ar 9:16 --style raw",
  "negative_prompt": "blurry, low resolution, distorted, deformed, extra limbs, watermark, text, signature, unrealistic, cartoon, drawing, painting, illustration, abstract",
  "style_raw": true,
  "aspect_ratio": "9:16"
}
```
